<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; class AddNotifierName implements FlareMiddleware { public const NOTIFIER_NAME = 'Laravel Client'; public function handle(Report $report, $next) { $report->notifierName(static::NOTIFIER_NAME); return $next($report); } }
